item.title: When is the next results date for Shree Securities Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Shree Securities Ltd is 10 March 2026. Time: Mar 09 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: Timken India Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Timken India Ltd has recently formed a Golden Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) has crossed above the 200-day moving average. This development often signals a potential bullish breakout, indicating a shift in long-term momentum and a possible trend reversal for the industrial products company. Time: Mar 09 2026 06:20 PM IST

item.title: Shreeoswal Seeds & Chemicals Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Shreeoswal Seeds & Chemicals Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raises concerns about sustained weakness in the near to medium term. Time: Mar 09 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Arvee Laboratories Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Arvee Laboratories (India) Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: Mar 09 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: PSP Projects Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: PSP Projects Ltd, a small-cap player in the construction sector, has recently formed a Death Cross—a technical pattern where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average—indicating a potential shift towards a bearish trend and signalling long-term weakness in the stock’s price momentum. Time: Mar 09 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Danube Industries Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend Ahead
item.description: Danube Industries Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raises concerns about long-term weakness amid already challenging market conditions. Time: Mar 09 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: BN Agrochem Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: BN Agrochem Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development highlights a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raises concerns about its long-term price strength amid already challenging market conditions. Time: Mar 09 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Zuari Agro Chemicals Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Zuari Agro Chemicals Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average, signalling a potential shift towards a prolonged bearish trend. This development comes amid deteriorating price momentum and weak fundamentals, raising concerns about the stock’s near- and long-term outlook. Time: Mar 09 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.description: Ravindra Energy Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raising concerns about its medium to long-term outlook. Time: Mar 09 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Outlook
item.description: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development highlights a deterioration in the stock’s medium-term momentum and raises concerns about sustained weakness in the coming months. Time: Mar 09 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Ishan Dyes and Chemicals Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend Ahead
item.description: Ishan Dyes and chemicals Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Specialty Chemicals sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-DMA. This technical development is widely regarded as a bearish signal, indicating a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raising concerns about its long-term price weakness. Time: Mar 09 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: GHV Infra Projects Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: GHV Infra Projects Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development often signals a shift towards a bearish trend and suggests a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum, raising concerns among investors about potential weakness ahead. Time: Mar 09 2026 06:00 PM IST
